narrative:
Precinct Norwalk 1-A (precinct in Huron County) has 865 registered voters, with 56.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 24.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.8%, a modest Republican lean of 5.5 percentage points.
